zh.lifeSummary: Henry Sinclair Baron of Roslin是William Sinclair 1st Lord Rosslyn和Amicia de Roskelyn的兒子，於1260年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林。他於大約1283年與Alice Fenton在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1296年登記服兵役。他於1305年被列為sheriff of lanark。他去世於1336年1月28日之前在英國蘇格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Sinclair
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Saint-Clair-sur-Elle (Manche), so called from the dedication of its church to Saint Clarus (see   Clare   3).
Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish surname.

History: The Scottish family Sinclair (see 1 above) came to southern Scotland in the twelfth century from Huntingdonshire with the de Morvilles. Descendants of these Sinclairs became earls of Caithness in the 15th century. The frequency of the surname in Caithness and Orkney is largely due to the adoption by tenants of the name of their overlord.

variants.name: Clare
meanings: Irish (Clare, Wicklow, and Wexford): habitational name from Clare in Suffolk (an eastern county of England), the center of a major Norman baronial estate since the Norman Conquest. The English placename probably originated as a Celtic river name meaning ‘bright, gentle, or warm’. The surname is not from the Irish county name Clare, which is either from the surname or from a place called with Gaelic clár ‘plank bridge’. Another Norman surname in the southeast of Ireland was de Clere, from Clères in Seine-Maritime (France), named from the local river.

English and French: from the Middle English, Old French female personal name Cla(i)re (from Latin Clara, from clarus ‘clear, bright, famous’) which achieved some popularity, greater elsewhere in Europe than in England, through the fame of Saint Clare of Assisi (see Chiara ). The English surname seems to have been interchangeable with Clear 1.

English: occupational name from an agent derivative of Middle English cley ‘clay’. The work of medieval clayers involved plastering a framework of interwoven twigs with mud to produce wattle-and-daub work.

variants.name: St. Clair
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Sinclair  . This is also a French Canadian and American French altered form of the same surname.
French (Saint-Clair): habitational name from any of several places, e.g. in Normandy, named Saint-Clair (from the dedication of their churches to Saint Clarus). Compare Saintclair .

Haitian (also Saint-Clair): ornamental name or nickname, perhaps ironic, composed of French saint ‘saint’ or ‘holy’ and clair ‘clear’ or ‘lightness’. Alternatively, perhaps of the same French origin as 2 above. Compare Saintclair .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: Henry Sinclair Baron of Roslin was born in 1260, in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland as the son of William Sinclair 1st Lord Rosslyn and Amicia de Roskelyn. He married Alice Fenton about 1283, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He registered for military service in 1296. In 1305, at the age of 45, his occupation is listed as sheriff of lanark. He died before 28 January 1336, in Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Henry Sinclair Baron of Roslin est né en 1260, à Roslin, Midlothian, Écosse, fils de William Sinclair 1st Lord Rosslyn et Amicia de Roskelyn. Il a épousé Alice Fenton environ 1283, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1296. En 1305, à l’âge de 45 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of lanark. Il est décédé avant 28 janvier 1336, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.Tower of London, London, Middlesex, Engl: Tower of London, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Henry Sinclair Baron of Roslin wurde 1260 in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, als Sohn von William Sinclair 1st Lord Rosslyn und Amicia de Roskelyn geboren. Er hat um 1283 in Scotland Alice Fenton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1296 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1305, als er 45 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of lanark aufgeführt. Er starb vor 28. Januar 1336 in Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Henry Sinclair Baron of Roslin è nato il nel 1260 nel Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland come figlio di William Sinclair 1st Lord Rosslyn e Amicia de Roskelyn. Lui sposato Alice Fenton circa 1283, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1296. Nel 1305, all'età di 45 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of lanark. Morì prima del 28 gennaio 1336, nel Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Sinclair Baron of Roslinは1260年にスコットランドミドロスアンロスリンでWilliam Sinclair 1st Lord RosslynとAmicia de Roskelynの息子として生まれた。約1283年にスコットランドでAlice Fentonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1296年に兵役登録をした。1305年，45歳の時，職業はsheriff of lanarkと記録されている。彼は1336年1月28日以前にイギリススコットランドで死去した。

ko.Tower of London, London, Middlesex, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 타워 프 런던
ko.lifeSummary: Henry Sinclair Baron of Roslin(은)는 1260년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 로슬린에서 William Sinclair 1st Lord Rosslyn(와)과 Amicia de Roskelyn의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1283년 스컷랜드에서 Alice Fenton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1296년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1305년, 45세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of lanark이었다. 그는 1336년 1월 28일 이전 영국 스코틀랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Henry Sinclair Baron of Roslin nasceu em 1260, em Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland filho de William Sinclair 1st Lord Rosslyn e Amicia de Roskelyn. Ele casou-se com Alice Fenton aproximadamente 1283, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1296. Em 1305, com 45 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of lanark. Ele faleceu antes 28 de janeiro de 1336, em Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Tower of London, London, Middlesex, Engl: тоуир оф лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Henry Sinclair Baron of Roslin родился в 1260 г. в местности рослинь, мидлотян, Шотландия. Его родителей звали William Sinclair 1st Lord Rosslyn и Amicia de Roskelyn. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Fenton около 1283 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. В 1296 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1305 году, в возрасте 45 лет, работал по профессии sheriff of lanark. Он умер перед 28 январь 1336 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Henry Sinclair Baron of Roslin nació en 1260, en Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland como hijo de William Sinclair 1st Lord Rosslyn y Amicia de Roskelyn. Se casó con Alice Fenton aproximadamente 1283, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1296. En 1305, a la edad de 45 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of lanark. Murió antes de 28 de enero de 1336, en Escocia, Reino Unido.
